messages.content: ugh so Juno got back to me about the masters... 5 out of 6 tracks are golden, like seriously they sound incredible. but track 4, Undertow? it's a mess. the low end is all muddy and i can't figure out if it's something i did in the mix or if it's just... wait no, i'm pretty sure it's my fault
That's frustrating, especially when you're so close to finishing. What do you think went wrong with the low end on Undertow specifically?

honestly? i think the bass parts are competing with each other. there's the synth bass doing this deep pulse thing and then i layered in some actual bass guitar for texture but they're both sitting in like the same frequency range. should've caught that before sending it off but i was so burnt out from the Vex thing in december
Ah, that frequency clash makes sense. Are you planning to re-record one of the bass parts or try to EQ your way out of it?

re-recording for sure. i'm gonna redo the bass guitar parts this week, maybe pitch them up an octave or just completely rethink the approach. the synth bass is the backbone of that track so that's staying put. it's just... man, this means pushing the release date back again
How much of a delay are you looking at? I know you were targeting March 15th originally.

yeah march 15 is definitely not happening now. i'm thinking maybe early april? depends how long the rework takes and then Juno needs time to master the new version. it's annoying because everything else is ready to go - the album art, the bandcamp page, even started teasing it on patreon. but i'd rather delay than put out something that sounds off, you know?
Absolutely, better to get it right than rush it. At least your Patreon followers will probably appreciate the behind-the-scenes insight into the process.

true, they've been really supportive about the whole thing. might do a little process video of me re-recording the bass parts actually - those have been getting good engagement lately. silver lining i guess? still feels weird having 5 perfect masters just sitting there waiting for their problem child sibling to get its act together

summary: Sam discusses mastering progress on their EP Tidal, with 5 of 6 tracks completed by Juno Audio but track 4 'Undertow' needing bass part re-recording due to muddy low end. The release date is being pushed back from March 15th.
